task.title: Move architecture drift checks out of scripts into source-owned audits
task.summary: Replace script-owned architecture drift checks with source-owned audit/test modules for dogfood/source taxonomy, stale architecture references, package reachability, generated-vs-canonical parity, and lock/audit readiness.

goal.outcome: The class of file-structure drift recently found manually is caught by source-owned audit/test checks, while scripts remain disposable wrappers or are removed.
acceptance: Checks fail on forbidden source folders, stale CodeWiki path references, product logic under scripts, and generated/canonical task-view mismatch.
Package audit fails when shipped source is unreachable/stale, lockfile is missing, or package dry-run includes/omits unexpected artifacts.
No product, gateway, or test semantic check depends on scripts for authoritative logic; any remaining script is a thin optional wrapper over source-owned code or is deleted.
Tests or fixtures intentionally introduce drift and confirm checks fail.
non_goals: Do not preserve scripts as authoritative product surfaces.
Do not conflate developer helper wrappers with application audit APIs.
verification: source-owned audit smoke covers file-structure drift

loop_start.reason: Compiler loops start from source refs and build handoffs, not prior loop chat memory.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

validation.reason: Implementation validation must not reuse builder thought context and must cite checked content proof.

next_loop.reason: The next gateway must independently validate implementation evidence and cite checked content proof.

summary: Implemented TASK-081 source-owned drift audit rules and fixtures for file-structure, stale references, package reachability/dry-run, generated task-view parity, and script demotion.

evidence: Added a temp-repo drift fixture smoke test with intentionally invalid source layer, stale reference, script-owned checks, package reachability/lockfile failures, and generated task-view mismatches.
Extended test:smoke so drift fixture runs with package smoke and audit smoke.
tester.boundary: derive tests or test-design evidence before code changes where practical

evidence: Extended file-structure audit to scan helper scripts for non-delegated product/audit semantics.
Upgraded stale-reference drift to an error in active docs/source.
Extended package audit with reachability, lockfile, and npm pack dry-run artifact checks.
Extended generated-parity audit to compare active generated task views with roadmap queue truth.
notes: Full audit passes on current repo after new rules.
TASK-079 audit substrate closed before this task; TASK-081 adds failure fixtures and stricter drift coverage on top.
builder.boundary: change code until tests, roadmap acceptance, and required checks pass

test_design_evidence: Added a temp-repo drift fixture smoke test with intentionally invalid source layer, stale reference, script-owned checks, package reachability/lockfile failures, and generated task-view mismatches.
Extended test:smoke so drift fixture runs with package smoke and audit smoke.
code_change_evidence: Extended file-structure audit to scan helper scripts for non-delegated product/audit semantics.
Upgraded stale-reference drift to an error in active docs/source.
Extended package audit with reachability, lockfile, and npm pack dry-run artifact checks.
Extended generated-parity audit to compare active generated task views with roadmap queue truth.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Checks fail on forbidden source folders, stale CodeWiki path references, product logic under scripts, and generated/canonical task-view mismatch.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: tests/smoke/audit-drift.test.mjs creates fixture drift for src/core, README stale extensions/codewiki/src, scripts/rogue.mjs owning checks, and mismatched .codewiki/roadmap/tasks/TASK-001 views; source audit profiles fail with expected issue kinds.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Package audit fails when shipped source is unreachable/stale, lockfile is missing, or package dry-run includes/omits unexpected artifacts.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: src/application/tools/audit.ts package profile checks package.json files reachability, pi extension/skill reachability, package-lock presence, and npm pack --dry-run artifacts; drift fixture asserts unreachable file, unreachable extension, and missing lockfile failures.
auditRoadmapTaskViewParity compares active task.json/context.json fields against canonical queue tasks and reports missing/mismatched task views.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: No product, gateway, or test semantic check depends on scripts for authoritative logic.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: scripts/check-architecture.mjs remains a thin executeCodewikiAudit wrapper; file-structure profile scans scripts for authoritative audit/product patterns and flags non-delegating scripts.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Tests or fixtures intentionally introduce drift and confirm checks fail.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: tests/smoke/audit-drift.test.mjs intentionally creates source, docs, package, script, and generated parity drift and asserts failing audit reports.

closure_brief.user_intent: Move architecture/file-structure drift checks out of scripts into source-owned audits and fixtures.
implemented_changes: Added stricter source-owned drift checks for scripts, stale references, package reachability/dry-run, lockfile, and generated task-view parity.
Added intentional drift fixture smoke coverage proving audits fail for target drift classes.
Kept scripts/check-architecture.mjs as a disposable wrapper over source-owned audit logic.
acceptance_evidence: audit-drift fixture asserts forbidden source folder, stale path, script-owned semantics, package reachability/lockfile, and generated task-view mismatch failures.
Current repo full audit passes with zero issues.
non_goals_preserved: Gateway verdicts remain separate from audit evidence.
remaining_risks: TASK-085 still owns broader regression fixture matrix beyond this source-owned audit smoke.

risks: npm pack dry-run inside package audit adds cost to the package profile, but only scoped/package/full audit invokes it.

handoff.fallback: Use codewiki_state refresh=true and this implementation_build; do not rely on chat transcript memory.

commit.title: chore(codewiki): record TASK-081 Move architecture drift checks out of scripts into source-owned audits implementation evidence
commit.body:
Implemented TASK-081 source-owned drift audit rules and fixtures for file-structure, stale references, package reachability/dry-run, generated task-view parity, and script demotion.

Checks: npm run typecheck, npm run check:architecture, node ./tests/smoke/audit-drift.test.mjs, npm run test:smoke, npm run test:pack, npm audit --audit-level=moderate --omit=dev, npm test, executeCodewikiAudit(default full) pass
Validation: no durable validation refs recorded.
Remote publication requires explicit approval; this build is recommendation-only.

CodeWiki-Task: TASK-081
CodeWiki-Build: .codewiki/builds/implementation/2026-05-16-task-081-source-owned-drift-fixtures.json
CodeWiki-Checks: npm run typecheck, npm run check:architecture, node ./tests/smoke/audit-drift.test.mjs, npm run test:smoke, npm run test:pack, npm audit --audit-level=moderate --omit=dev, npm test, executeCodewikiAudit(default full) pass
CodeWiki-Validation: <pending-validation>
CodeWiki-Recover: /wiki-restore TASK-081
CodeWiki-Archive-Ref: refs/codewiki/archive/task/TASK-081
CodeWiki-Digest: sha256:81af747f2b6792d09ce2dfa6b446cfd397bf04ff4c538349819ecc730cc12b22
CodeWiki-Restore: /wiki-restore TASK-081
